allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/players_base.json'\)\); print\('count', len\(d\)\); print\(d[0]\); print\(d[-1]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/players_base.json'\)\); print\('total:', len\(d\)\); from collections import Counter; print\('by tier:', Counter\(e[5] for e in d\)\); print\('by role:', Counter\(e[1] for e in d\)\); print\('overseas:', sum\(1 for e in d if e[2]!='IND'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/players_base.json'\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d[:4], ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)\); print\('...'\); print\(json.dumps\(d[-3:], ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/players_base.json'\)\); print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(e[0] for e in d\)\)\)")
